doc_title: Pseudonymisation Under the GDPR — EDPB Guidelines 01/2025
label: fabricated
reason: The European Data Protection Board has not issued "Guidelines 01/2025" on pseudonymisation; the numbering and document do not exist in the official EDPB register.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The European Data Protection Board (EDPB) has not issued "Guidelines 01/2025" on pseudonymisation, and existing EDPB guidance on the topic (such as Opinion 05/2014) remains the primary institutional reference.
response_turn2:
